title: reborn!
description: it makes minecraft a whole new game :)
body:
- it refreshes minecraft with a TON of visual mods and other cool things :)

- has world generation mods like [**Floravive**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/floravive) and [**Trek**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Trek)

- it has backpacks! from the [**Inmis**](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis) mod

- it has mods like [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [**Bobby**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) which lets you see farther and run the game better

- has a lot of resourcepacks, like [**Benigamer's Enhanced Visuals**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/benigamers-enhanced-visuals) and [**Enchantment Glows**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchantment-glows)

- its based off of [**Adrenaline**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline), so it has really good performance

- it has most of the mods from this video
